Standing_Weight_Shift.pose_description: Full body shot. Subject standing neutrally, weight shifted slightly to the left leg, creating a subtle S-curve in the spine. Shoulders relaxed, arms resting naturally at sides.
Standing_Weight_Shift.camera_move: Camera tracks slowly inward, narrowing the field of view.
Standing_Weight_Shift.body_move: Subject subtly shifts their weight entirely to the right leg, relaxing the left knee.

Seated_Front_Pose.pose_description: Medium full shot. Subject seated facing the camera, torso slightly leaned back. Legs open and relaxed, hands resting softly on thighs.
Seated_Front_Pose.camera_move: Camera slowly dollies forward toward the subject's face.
Seated_Front_Pose.body_move: Subject slowly leans the torso forward, applying slight hand pressure onto the thighs.

Seated_Side_Lean.pose_description: Medium shot. Subject seated and leaning heavily to one side, supporting upper body weight on one hand. Spine curved, relaxed posture.
Seated_Side_Lean.camera_move: Camera slowly pans to follow the angle of the lean.
Seated_Side_Lean.body_move: Subject slowly lowers their head, dropping tension from the supporting shoulder.

Kneeling_Forward_Support.pose_description: Medium full shot. Subject kneeling on the floor, leaning forward with body weight supported on hands placed squarely on the ground.
Kneeling_Forward_Support.camera_move: Camera booms down slowly, decreasing the viewing angle.
Kneeling_Forward_Support.body_move: Subject slowly lowers their chest closer to the floor, bending the elbows.

Hands_and_Knees_Neutral_Geometry.pose_description: Medium full shot. Subject squarely positioned on hands and knees. Back is completely flat and neutral, establishing clean horizontal alignment.
Hands_and_Knees_Neutral_Geometry.camera_move: Camera slowly tracks laterally to the side.
Hands_and_Knees_Neutral_Geometry.body_move: Subject arches their back slowly, lifting the spine and dropping the head.

Reclined_Diagonal_Pose.pose_description: Full body shot. Subject reclining diagonally on the ground. Torso slightly elevated, resting on elbows, legs extended and relaxed.
Reclined_Diagonal_Pose.camera_move: Camera slowly tracks diagonally, matching the subject's alignment.
Reclined_Diagonal_Pose.body_move: Subject slowly relaxes their neck, letting the head fall back slightly.

Side_Lying_Bend.pose_description: Full body shot. Subject lying on their side on the floor. Spine naturally curved, knees drawn up slightly, bottom arm extended for support.
Side_Lying_Bend.camera_move: Camera slowly arcs around the subject's back.
Side_Lying_Bend.body_move: Subject slowly draws their top knee closer to their chest.

Low_Crouch_Support.pose_description: Medium shot. Subject in a deep, low crouch near the floor. Weight resting entirely on the feet, torso folded forward with hands touching the ground.
Low_Crouch_Support.camera_move: Camera slowly tracks down to eye-level with the ground.
Low_Crouch_Support.body_move: Subject slowly shifts their center of gravity forward, applying more pressure to the hands.
